provenance.verdict_reason: Piano Sonata No. 16 in C Major, K. 545, I. Allegro (1788) by Wolfgang Amadeus Mozart. Composition: US=public_domain, EU=public_domain. Arrangement by Bernd Krueger. annotation_target.structure: Opening theme — ascending C major scale statement (m.1) followed by melodic response over Alberti bass (mm. 2–4)
key_moments: m1 iconic ascending scale C5→C6 — tonic statement
m2 melodic E5→B4 descent over Alberti bass (G-C-E pattern)
m4 half cadence on G — phrase closes on dominant, prepares repeat
teaching_goals: Classical-era touch and articulation — clean, vocal phrasing
style_tips: clean even articulation — no pedal abuse
Alberti bass light and even — never louder than melody
phrasing should be elegant and vocal, not percussive

teaching_notes.note: The ascending scale to high C is Mozart's calling card — pure and bright, no slur.
LH Alberti pattern: C-G-E-G repeated — keep it light so RH melody sings.

target_trace.objective: Read mm. 1–4 of Mozart K545 Movement 1, view the piano roll, analyze the opening theme, play the phrase in a loop, then produce a phrase annotation.

session.content: Read measures 1–4 of Mozart's K545 first movement and explain what's happening musically.
Let me view the piano roll for mm. 1–4.

The opening is immediately recognizable: m.1 has an ascending C major scale from C5 to C6 in the RH, while the LH begins its characteristic Alberti bass (alternating C-G-E-G pattern). Mm. 2–4 develop the melody downward with E5→D5→B4, closing on a half cadence at m.4 on the dominant G. The texture is completely transparent — thin Classical style, melody over harmonic support. Let me loop mm. 1–4 so you can hear the phrase shape.

Phrase summary — Mozart K545 mm. 1–4: opening theme, C major. Ascending scale m.1 + melodic descent mm. 2–4 over Alberti bass. Half cadence at m.4. Teaching focus: Alberti bass evenness, Classical articulation, vocal phrasing.

eval_metadata.split_strategy: stratified by (composer, composition_id) with MIDI byte-hash dedup
eval_metadata.phrase_continuation_eligible_reason: Record covers mm. 1–4 entirely; for E2 a separate record with held-out measures is required.
